title: Chuldah #2468
definition:
Huldah = "weasel"

 1) a prophetess in the time of Josiah whom Josiah asked for an
    authoritative opinion on the book of the law which Hilkiah found
nasbUsage:
Definition: Huldah = "weasel"

 1) a prophetess in the time of Josiah whom Josiah asked for an
    authoritative opinion on the book of the law which Hilkiah found
